recommended_navigation: Tab bar with large title screens
color_approach: systemGreen systemRed systemBlue semantically for vitals
typography_mood: Body weight Regular 17pt for readability; headline for metrics
key_patterns: Dashboard cards with data rings; progressive disclosure of detailed stats; large accessible targets
anti_patterns: Cluttered dashboards; small tap targets on critical actions; alarming red overuse
decision_rules: Prioritize calm reassurance; use color to indicate status not decorate; large touch targets for accessibility

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with account overview as root
color_approach: systemGreen for positive systemRed for negative neutral grays for amounts
typography_mood: Headline for amounts; body for descriptions; monospaced for numbers
key_patterns: Transaction list with swipe actions; large numbers for balances; biometric auth entry
anti_patterns: Hiding fees or negative amounts; confusing color coding; non-accessible number formats
decision_rules: Use tabular figures for alignment; green/red only for gain/loss; never red for neutral amounts

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with feed as root
color_approach: systemBlue for interactions systemPink for reactions tinted backgrounds
typography_mood: Body 17pt for posts; headline for usernames; caption for metadata
key_patterns: Infinite scroll with FlashList; pull-to-refresh; double-tap to like; story ring pattern
anti_patterns: Chronological confusion; hidden reply actions; non-obvious interaction affordances
decision_rules: Image-first layout; show engagement counts; reply thread indentation capped at 2 levels

recommended_navigation: Tab bar or sidebar on iPad split view
color_approach: systemBlue for actions systemGray family for structure
typography_mood: Headline for task titles; footnote for metadata; monospaced for code snippets
key_patterns: Swipe to complete; contextual menus; keyboard shortcuts on iPad; drag-and-drop reordering
anti_patterns: Feature bloat on main screen; toolbar icon ambiguity; missing undo support
decision_rules: Today-focused default view; group by project or date; one primary CTA per screen

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with Now Playing persistent bar
style_priority: Rich dark backgrounds for playback immersion
color_approach: Dynamic colors from artwork; systemBlue for controls
typography_mood: Large display for title; headline for artist; caption for metadata
key_patterns: Mini player expanding to full screen; artwork-dominant layout; swipe-to-dismiss player
anti_patterns: Hiding playback controls; confusing queue management; no progress scrubber
decision_rules: Artwork background blur for player; 44pt minimum for all playback controls

color_approach: systemBlue for route systemGreen for destination systemRed for traffic
typography_mood: Callout for POI labels; footnote for distances; headline for destination name
key_patterns: Bottom sheet with detents; search bar at top; turn-by-turn overlay; recenter button
anti_patterns: Overlapping UI on map; tiny route interaction targets; non-dismissible overlays
decision_rules: Map always occupies full screen; sheet slides up for details; search is always reachable

recommended_navigation: Single scrollable screen or page tabs
color_approach: Dynamic condition-based gradients; white text on colored backgrounds
typography_mood: Large display for temperature; body for conditions; caption for hourly
key_patterns: Hourly strip at top; 10-day list; condition gradient background; animated icons
anti_patterns: Overcrowded data; competing background colors; static icons for animated conditions
decision_rules: One screen one location; swipe to switch locations; animate weather transitions

color_approach: Minimal UI; white icons on dark transparent overlays; system controls
typography_mood: Caption for metadata; no prominent text during capture
key_patterns: Swipe to switch modes; tap-to-focus indicator; volume button shutter; pinch-to-zoom
anti_patterns: Cluttered viewfinder controls; opaque toolbars blocking preview; hidden mode switching
decision_rules: Maximize viewfinder space; reveal controls on tap; capture action is always primary

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with browse and account tabs
color_approach: systemBlue for CTA systemGreen for price drops systemRed for sale badges
typography_mood: Headline for product name; title2 for price; body for description
key_patterns: Product grid with lazy images; sticky add-to-cart button; swipe-based image carousel
anti_patterns: Burying the buy button; cluttered product pages; non-obvious cart access
decision_rules: Price and primary CTA always visible without scroll; image carousel is swipeable; cart badge on tab

color_approach: Game-defined palette with system overlays for achievements and notifications
typography_mood: Display weight for scores; game fonts for in-game; system fonts for menus
key_patterns: Leaderboard sheets; achievement banners; in-app purchase sheets; haptic feedback on actions
anti_patterns: System chrome bleeding into game view; obscuring gameplay with banners; tiny reward text
decision_rules: Achievement notifications use system banners; purchases use App Store sheet; gameplay is uninterrupted

color_approach: systemBlue for interactive systemGreen for correct systemRed for incorrect
typography_mood: Body for content; headline for lesson titles; large for score display
key_patterns: Progress bars; streaks; lesson cards; quiz flow with immediate feedback
anti_patterns: Wall of text without hierarchy; hidden progress; no positive reinforcement on completion
decision_rules: Show progress always; celebrate completion; scaffold complexity progressively

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with conversation list as root
color_approach: systemBlue for sent bubbles gray fill for received systemRed for errors
typography_mood: Body for message text; caption for timestamps; footnote for read receipts
key_patterns: Bubble layout; swipe-to-reply; long-press context menu; typing indicator
anti_patterns: Non-standard bubble colors; hidden reply actions; timestamp ambiguity
decision_rules: System keyboard respect; message input bar pinned to keyboard; delivery status below each bubble

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with menu browse as root
color_approach: Warm tones amber and red accents; systemGreen for available systemRed for sold out
typography_mood: Title1 for restaurant name; headline for item name; body for description; callout for price
key_patterns: Category strip; add button on card; floating cart pill; order tracking map
anti_patterns: Hiding delivery fee until checkout; confusing modifier flow; non-obvious cart update
decision_rules: Cart total always visible; upsell only after primary item added; track order on same tab

recommended_navigation: Tab bar or page tabs for itinerary
style_priority: Rich destination imagery with structured data
color_approach: systemBlue for interactive; destination imagery dominant; systemGreen for confirmed
typography_mood: Large title for destination; body for details; callout for price and date
key_patterns: Map integration; trip timeline; booking confirmation sheet; search with date pickers
anti_patterns: Fragmented itinerary across screens; hidden booking confirmation; confusing date selection
decision_rules: Single trip view as root; map tab for exploration; booking details accessible from any step

recommended_navigation: Tab bar with today workout as primary
